name: The Gregor Private Indoor Golf and Club
about: The Gregor is a private luxury indoor golf club and member facility offering 24/7 access to its facilities. The venue provides a sophisticated, modern environment designed for socializing and playing golf, positioned as a premium alternative to traditional country clubs with a more intimate and curated setting. Members enjoy benefits such as leagues, guest privileges, and an accurate golf simulator experience, though specific details on course availability or simulator models are limited in the provided information.
why_golfers_like_it: Sophisticated modern design and premium environment
Private golf lessons and club fittings available
Accurate and immersive golf simulator experience

food_and_drink.notes: Refreshment area available; external food not specified.
Wet bar with fridge, ice machine, and glassware available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Curved screen enclosure with an unspecified launch monitor.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Gregor offers club fittings, but whether members need to bring their own clubs is not specified in the provided content.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a refreshment area and wet bar, but external food and drink policies are not mentioned.

faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not provided in the content.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Gregor is a 21+ private luxury indoor golf club, indicating it is not kid-friendly.
